frontmatter.title: Drawer
frontmatter.description: The `Drawer` component smoothly adds extra content like navigation to your main app. It can sit on the left or right as you like. Users can open/close it by clicking stuff. When open, it takes up the full screen height, dimming other stuff and focusing on its content. And yes, there's a neat button at the top to close it when you're done. Super convenient and stylish for your app!
